Unlock Full Access - $7/mo Secured by Stripe · Instant access No thanks, I'll stay limited to 5 replay trades per day Back to offer Jump to Simulation Time Current Time: --:-- Jump to: Cancel Jump All Searchesc × All Stocks Futures Forex Crypto ↑↓ Navigate Enter Select Esc Close Trading Simulator Disclaimer This platform is a trading SIMULATION only. No real money or assets are involved. Risk Disclosure Day trading involves substantial risk and is not suitable for all investors. The simulation provided here does not represent real market conditions. Market data may be delayed, inaccurate, or simplified for educational purposes. No Financial Advice This simulator does not provide investment advice. All trades, strategies, and results are purely for educational and entertainment purposes. Success in simulation does not indicate success in real trading. Nothing on this platform constitutes investment advice or any recommendation that any particular security or strategy is suitable for any specific person. Market Data & Accuracy While we strive to provide accurate real-time market data, we make no warranties about the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of any information provided. Market data may be delayed and should not be relied upon for actual trading decisions. Technical Limitations The simulator may not replicate all aspects of real trading including: Order execution delays Price slippage Complex order types Full market depth Real-time market impact Past Performance Any historical returns, expected returns, or probability projections are hypothetical in nature and may not reflect actual future performance. Past performance in the simulator does not guarantee future results in real trading. No Warranty & Limitation of Liability This simulator is provided "as is" without any warranty of any kind. We disclaim all warranties, express or implied, including but not limited to merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement. In no event shall simul8or or its operators be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use of this simulator. By using this simulator, you acknowledge these limitations and agree that your use is solely for practice and educational purposes. I Understand Master the Markets with #simul8or 380K+ Traders building skills 7.7M+ Total trades executed 63% Average win rate $7.2B+ Virtual profits generated Join thousands of traders turning practice into profits Best experienced in your browser, but also available from these app stores: What is simul8or? simul8or is a free stock trading simulator. Train decision-making on historical market sessions: test entries and exits, manage risk, and review every trade directly on the chart-no account required. How the trading simulator works Instant practice: choose a stock and session date, then play, pause, or step through bars. Realistic controls: long/short, market/limit, stops and profit targets with instant fills. Performance tracking: P&L, win rate, average win/loss, equity curve, and on-chart trade review. Skill building: challenges and leaderboards designed for consistent day trading reps. AI Chart Analyzer The AI Chart Analyzer accelerates study with AI chart analysis: pattern and momentum context, support/resistance zones, and basic risk-to-reward framing. Use it to turn observations into clear trade plans during replay and live sessions. AI outputs are educational and not financial advice. Paper trading When you want live practice, use our paper trading browser extensions (Chrome and Edge). They enable paper trading on supported sites so you can place simulated orders while prices update-ideal for timing drills without a brokerage account. Why traders use our simulator No friction: practice immediately-no account or funding required. Fast iteration: instant fills and clear metrics for tight feedback loops. Built for day traders: a focused trading simulator to refine process and risk control. Everywhere you are: web app, desktop (Microsoft Store), and extensions for paper trading. FAQ Is this a stock market simulator or a trading game? It's a realistic stock trading simulator for serious practice and process improvement. Is this paper trading? The core app is a trading simulator using replay (historical sessions). Live Paper trading is available via our browser extensions. Do I need a brokerage account? No. The simulator and extensions let you practice without opening or funding a brokerage account. Can I short and use stops/targets? Yes-long or short with stops and profit targets for realistic risk management. What does the AI Chart Analyzer do? AI-powered chart context-patterns, momentum, support/resistance, and risk-to-reward hints-to speed idea generation. Is simul8or free? The core simulator is free. Optional upgrades support continued development. Simulator Trading Simulator Live Trading Simulator Trading Game Practice Trading Trading Metrics Leaderboards Trading Tools AI Chart Analyzer Crypto Trading Bot Chart Pattern Challenge Browser Extensions Stock Chart WordPress Plugin JavaScript Stock Charts OpenClaw Trading Markets & Community Charts Markets Trading Feed Trading Memes Trading Podcast Prop Trading Company About FAQ Contact Privacy Policy Terms Disclaimer © 2026 All rights reserved. simul8or is a free stock trading simulator app designed for day traders to practice their strategies in a simulated real-time, risk-free environment. No registration or email is required, allowing you to jump straight into paper trading and improve your skills with real market data. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced trader, simul8or offers the perfect platform to refine your approach in an engaging game-like interface. Personalize Your Experience Sign in to customize your trading setup with a personal alias, avatar, and hotkey preferences. Unlock $1M Virtual Capital Sign in to expand your simulator to a million-dollar account. $1M extra paper money, instantly Same simulator, bigger swings Size up trades & stress-test strategies Continue with Google Continue with Facebook By signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy Are you sure you want to log out? We're excited to have you here! Community features are in the works and coming soon. In the meantime, dive into the trading simulator and explore all the powerful tools simul8or has to offer. outbound.opener: Vi Experience the thrill of the stock market with our Ultimate Free Day Trading Simulator. e parece haver uma ligação clara a community/audience.
outbound.dm: Olá, vi o teu trabalho ligado a trading/forex e pareceu-me que pode haver uma conversa interessante de parceria. Lidero Business Development e trabalho com parceiros, comunidades e afiliados em mercados globais. Faz sentido falarmos 15 minutos esta semana?
outbound.followUp: Acho que há potencial para uma conversa objetiva: audiência/comunidade de trading, estrutura de parceria e crescimento com uma corretora regulada. Tens disponibilidade esta semana?
